scripts.prepare:deps: pnpm --filter @xifan-coder/core run build && pnpm --filter @xifan-coder/plugin-bus run build && pnpm --filter @xifan-coder/mem run build
scripts.test: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: vitest run src/__tests__/agent-runner.test.ts src/__tests__/cli.test.ts src/__tests__/commands.test.ts src/__tests__/index.test.ts src/__tests__/parse.test.ts src/__tests__/repl.test.ts src/__tests__/slash-router.test.ts src/__tests__/update-checker.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: vitest run src/__tests__/agent-runner.test.ts src/__tests__/cli.test.ts src/__tests__/commands.test.ts src/__tests__/index.test.ts src/__tests__/parse.test.ts src/__tests__/repl.test.ts src/__tests__/slash-router.test.ts --coverage.enabled true --coverage.provider v8 --coverage.reporter text-summary --coverage.reporter json-summary
